rationale: The citing paper is an editor-in-chief perspective on JMR strategy/processes (not an empirical study) and its note explicitly says it relies on illustrative references rather than substantive hypothesis/data use. The cited paper is a specific Kiva microfinance field study, which appears likely to be an example of published work rather than a core source for the editorial’s arguments. With only a single DOI-level match and no in-text usage evidence, this pair looks like an incidental mention.
